title: At a LOSS for Chiseled Textures
description: A cursed texture pack for some chiseled blocks
body:
Changes the textures of 4 chiseled blocks!
- Chiseled Sandstone
- Chiseled Resin Bricks
- Polished Chiseled Deepslate
- Chiseled Tuff Bricks

If you stack them together you can a nifty little image >:3
